title: The Andhra Pradesh Legislative Council Act, 2005
full_text: The Andhra Pradesh Legislative Council Act, 2005 आंध्र प्रदेश विधान परिषद् अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200601 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 2006-01-11 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Andhra Pradesh Legislative Council Act, 2005 Hindi Title: आंध्र प्रदेश विधान परिषद् अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the creation of Legislative Council for the State of Andhra Pradesh and for matters supplemental, incidental and consequential thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 30--03-2007 Notification: 30th March, 2007, (Legislative Council for Andhra Pradesh come to existence), vide notification No. G.S.R. 262(E), dated 30th March, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Creation of Legislative Council for Andhra Pradesh. Section 4. Amendment of Third Schedule and Fourth Schedule of Act 43 of 1950. Section 5. Amendment of section 15A of Act 43 of 1951.
